item.title: Blueprint directory path mismatch: configs/templates/ vs configs/blueprints/
item.intent: configs/blueprints/ is the canonical path. Rename configs/templates/ before CQ-009 implementation begins. The loader targets one path, not two.
item.description: The 6 blueprint YAMLs live in configs/templates/ but ARCHITECTURE.md and CLAUDE.md specify configs/blueprints/ as the target path. CQ-009 (blueprint loader) must know which path to use. Must resolve before CQ-009 implementation or the loader will target wrong directory.
